name: Self-Supervised Bio-Inspired Robotic Trajectory Planning with Obstacle Avoidance

description: arXiv:2607.20743v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Trajectory planning is a fundamental problem in robotics, requiring the generation of collision-free and efficient trajectories in a potentially complex environment. While sampling-based planners remain the dominant approach, they are often computationally expensive, particularly in high-dimensional spaces and obstacle-rich environments. Methods...
author: Miroslav Krupa, Miroslav Cibula, Krist\'ina Malinovsk\'a
